name: Hyoyeon Who Buys Me Food Well
overview: "Hyoyeon Who Buys Me Food Well" is a talk show under Hyoyeon's YouTube channel "Hyo's Level Up", where the Girls' Generation member chats with guests while treating them to delicious meals.

trailers.title: It's so funny. Hyoyeon's Universe, start (with NINGNING, Bomi, Ten, YangYang)
